text.content:
Every setting has a hover hint. This guide covers the things hints cannot.

First-time setup

  1. Open Game Settings > Module Settings > Ionrift Quartermaster.
  2. Pick a Quick Setup profile (Low, Standard, or High). This sets loot abundance, magic frequency, identification rules, and scroll jitter in one click. Sources, milestone band, and content packs are left alone.
  3. Open the Compendium Forge and compile your pools. The module ships source-ready but does not compile until you tell it to. An amber badge appears on the Forge button when pools need compiling.
  4. Set the Campaign Milestone Profile to match your campaign's level range. The Signature Ledger spaces six milestones across whatever band you choose.

Quick Setup profiles

LowStandardHigh
Loot abundance×0.5×1×1.5
Magic frequency×0.25×1×1.5
Magic ammoOff×1×1.5
Healing potions×0.5×1×2.5
IdentificationFull maskingFull maskingAll off
Scroll jitter012

You can fine-tune individual sliders after picking a profile. The profile is a starting point, not a lock.

Compendium Forge

The Compendium Forge compiles your chosen item and spell compendiums into unified draw pools for cache generation. It accepts both legacy and 2024-format compendiums together, normalises gold values and item weight, resolves collisions between similar-named items, and generates +N permutations for magical weapon and armor templates. Compile after changing sources; the amber badge clears once everything is fresh.
